scenes.supernova_script: Narrator says: English बोलने की practice करो हमारे AI tutor के साथ। [Practice speaking English with our AI tutor.] Instant feedback पाओ और अपना confidence बढ़ाओ। [Get instant feedback and boost your confidence.] आज ही Supernova try करो। [Try Supernova today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the user with the core value proposition of practicing spoken English.
- Highlights the AI tutor and instant feedback features to build confidence.
- Ends with a clear, encouraging call to action to try the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
SUPERNOVA
Practice English Speaking
(with AI Tutor)
SUPERNOVA
4:48
What do you like to do on holiday?
